facebook.caption: POV: you take a wrong turn on Đ. 30 Tháng 4 and end up at Chill Bar Đồi Trăng. 4.7 stars. 159 reviews. Nobody in your tour group has heard of it. Order something cold. Sit down. You're not leaving soon. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Wrong turn. Right place. Chill Bar Đồi Trăng on Đ. 30 Tháng 4 has 4.7 stars and 159 reviews. Your group chat doesn't know about this one yet.

instagram.video_caption: 4.7 stars on Đ. 30 Tháng 4. Walked past it twice. Don't be me.
